pageContext.name: Kakashi Hatake DX
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Kakashi Hatake DX Collectible Figure!  From the hit Naruto: Shippuden anime comes a Variable Action Heroes DX figure of Hatake Kakashi! He features multiple interchangeable parts and premium articulation for maximum poseability.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Naruto collection today!
